name: Codeium
description: Free forever AI code completion and chat assistant. Supports 70+ languages and integrates with VS Code, JetBrains, and more. Zero cost — no credit card required.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: The industry-standard AI pair programmer. Suggests code line-by-line and whole functions as you type. Free tier available for verified students via GitHub Education.

name: Cursor
logoStyle: font-size: 1.5rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:36px; height:36px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:8px;
description: A VS Code fork rebuilt around AI. Chat with your entire codebase, apply multi-file edits in one command, and get next-level inline suggestions. Great once you understand the basics.

name: Tabnine
logoStyle: font-size: 1.4rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:36px; height:36px; background:rgba(145,218,235,0.1); border-radius:8px; color:rgb(145,218,235);
description: AI code completion focused on privacy — can run models locally on your machine so your code never leaves your computer. Good free tier for individuals.

name: Supermaven
logoStyle: font-size: 1.2rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:36px; height:36px; background:rgba(255,159,67,0.1); border-radius:8px;
description: Blazing fast autocomplete with a 300,000-token context window — one of the largest available. Exceptional at understanding large codebases and completing long code patterns.

name: ChatGPT
logoStyle: font-size: 1.2rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:36px; height:36px; background:rgba(76,209,55,0.08); border-radius:8px;
description: Explain any error message, concept, or piece of code in plain language. Invaluable for beginners — ask it "what does this error mean?" and get a clear answer instantly.

name: Claude
logoStyle: font-size: 1.2rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:36px; height:36px; background:rgba(253,203,110,0.1); border-radius:8px;
description: Excels at understanding large files and nuanced code problems. Paste your entire project file, ask it to find bugs or refactor code. Known for being accurate and less prone to hallucinating.

name: Perplexity AI
logoStyle: font-size: 1.2rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:36px; height:36px; background:rgba(145,218,235,0.08); border-radius:8px;
description: An AI-powered search engine that cites its sources. Use it to research documentation, find tutorials, or understand a concept — it summarizes the web for you with real links.

name: Amazon Q Developer
description: AWS's free AI coding companion (formerly CodeWhisperer). Integrates with VS Code, scans for security vulnerabilities, and is free for individual developers — no AWS account required for VS Code use.

name: Pieces for Developers
logoStyle: font-size: 1.2rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:36px; height:36px; background:rgba(162,155,254,0.1); border-radius:8px;
description: An AI-powered snippet manager that saves code snippets with context (what it does, where it came from). Also includes a local AI assistant that works offline — no data sent to cloud.
